problem: What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient
hypothesis: Dopamine/serotonin reuptake inhibition with specificity may resolve What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient by blocking at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 32 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
